action.reasoning: Observation: The CNN has 7 input channels (weight [32, 7, 3, 3]) but gets 3-channel input. Analysis: SB3 detects the image as an image space and transposes it from (H,W,C) to (C,H,W), so the observation_space['image'].shape becomes (3,7,7). But I'm using shape[2]=7 as n_input_channels. Fix: use shape[0] for channel-first format, and don't permute in forward since SB3 already handles it. Also need to handle the direction properly. Decision: Fix model.py to use shape[0] for channels and remove the permutation logic.
